address.Address: 6-3-864, Saadat Manzil, Ameerpet, Hyderabad, Telangana 500016, India

school_address.streetAddress: 6-3-864, Saadat Manzil, Ameerpet, Hyderabad, Telangana 500016, India

reviews.author: Shilpa Krishnan
reviews.review_body:
Alum of 2002. A super progressive school that combines the best of traditional and modern methods. Made up for the smallish playground by offering a host of activities - pottery, art, special ed, and off late AI.
The wellstocked library helped me become the writer i am today. And jyothi mams lectures on spirituality Keep coming to me during troubles and good times :)

Jivitesh Sir, the current Pricipal, is very proactive and has given the school a complete makeover!

reviews.author: Shafiya Javeed
reviews.review_body: principal is not concern about the studies of the students he only cares about the maintenance of the school from outside, he is blindly increasing the quantities of the students .my kids are studying since LKG class there is no improvement in there studies we have tried our best from our side changed so many tuitions but now we understood the main fault it is is schools fault

reviews.author: Sandeep Goud
reviews.review_body: I just found this school on Times newspaper article which ranked them no.1 (ICSE) school in Hyderabad. Kudo's for this achievement.

reviews.author: Vanisha Choudary
reviews.review_body: Best school and also has good and experience teachers

reviews.author: Namrata Sen
reviews.review_body: One of the worst schools with rude administrators and principal. Went for the admission of both my kids aged 4+ years (twins) in UKG. My kids also appeared for a written test. They judged them so hard in interview even if it was their first visit to any school post covid. They told us our kids are below standard. Mind you they were just 4+ years old. What's more they also asked us to give us an undertaking in written that the teachers are not responsible for the performance of the students, jst because session started in Mar-April, and we went to admission in end of April (it was late by their standard).

reviews.author: Amarjeet Jayanthi
reviews.review_body: This is one of the best schools in the country.I learnt a lot from this school.

reviews.author: sudha vangala
reviews.review_body: Nice school kind disciplined cleaned everything is perfect best school

reviews.author: Ravi kumar
reviews.review_body:
We don't like the management, no respect and no minimum ethics in Niraj.

School fee and transportation fee parents should pay through app only.  Few months back I visited the school and asked the management, transport fee is not reflecting on school app, they said we are working on the app we will update to you.

Two days back(Friday) they called me, and they said that transportation fee due date is over, and I asked about app issue and after reinstalling it is working. The fee due is showing 87,400, as a middle-class person I need a few days' time to pay this amount. Today(Monday) transport bus did not come to my place and my kid waited for 20 minutes and came back home. I asked the management and they said we stopped the transportation due to pending fee. From tomorrow we will not allow her to school, if comes we will not provide the lunch. I requested them to pay the fee in 2 to 3 days. they did not agree.

I did not get any message or call about the fee due dates. As a parent, what should I do, I felt so sad on this situation. no moral values and ethics, I am feeling shameful my kid is studying in this school.
